violations.text: The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The hand-washing sink in the dishwasher area was blocked by a cart. The hand-washing sink in the chocolate room was blocked by a trash can. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen, and chocolate room were lacking proper signage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Sausages observed held at 131 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sausages were placed in oven. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
Rice, and beef w/gravy were observed with date marks exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
Utensils in the chocolate room are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen and chocolate area. Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the ( ) area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The slicer was not in good repair, with a rubber piece on a food contact area jagged and not tightly sealed, impacting its ability to be cleaned and santized. Slicer is not to be used until it has been repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener, mixers, plastic cart, utensil storage drawer have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris.Portable fan in the dishwasher area has an accumulation of dust.Paper & adhesive observed on several containers. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
Food was observed held past 7 days from preparation. Food was voluntarily disposed of by the PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Lid for ice machine was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of white residue. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
